title: scutellaria blepharophylla
intro: Scutellaria blepharophylla, also known as the Asian skullcap, is a type of flowering plant in the mint family native to China and Southeast Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria blepharophylla include reducing inflammation and improving cognitive function, as well as having antioxidant and anticonvulsant properties. Herbal preparations of Scutellaria blepharophylla can be found in capsule or tea form, and are often used to support brain health and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and insomnia.
